mapper.sql: CONT_NO, CONT_SEQ, CONT_NM, START_DT, END_DT, ISU_START_DT, ISU_END_DT, USE_START_DT, USE_END_DT, CONT_REG_DT, USE_START_DT_CALC_TYPE_CD, USE_START_DT_CALC_VAL, USE_PERIOD_CALC_TYPE_CD, USE_PERIOD_CALC_VAL, CONT_STS_CD, MIX_USE_YN, ISU_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD, ISU_PERIOD_MAX_PT, ISU_PERIOD_MAX_CNT, ONCE_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD, ONCE_ISU_FIX_PT, ONCE_ISU_PURCHASE_RATE, ONCE_ISU_MIN_PT, ONCE_ISU_MAX_PT, USE_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD, USE_PERIOD_MAX_PT, USE_PERIOD_MAX_CNT, ONCE_USE_LIMIT_TYPE_CD, ONCE_USE_FIX_PT, ONCE_USE_PURCHASE_RATE, ONCE_USE_MIN_PT, ONCE_USE_MAX_PT, TOTAL_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT, MIN_PURCHASE_AMT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_sub_cont_mst
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_sub_cont_mst (CONT_NO, CONT_SEQ, CONT_NM, START_DT, END_DT, ISU_START_DT, ISU_END_DT, USE_START_DT, USE_END_DT, CONT_REG_DT, USE_START_DT_CALC_TYPE_CD, USE_START_DT_CALC_VAL, USE_PERIOD_CALC_TYPE_CD, USE_PERIOD_CALC_VAL, CONT_STS_CD, MIX_USE_YN, ISU_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD, ISU_PERIOD_MAX_PT, ISU_PERIOD_MAX_CNT, ONCE_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD, ONCE_ISU_FIX_PT, ONCE_ISU_PURCHASE_RATE, ONCE_ISU_MIN_PT, ONCE_ISU_MAX_PT, USE_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD, USE_PERIOD_MAX_PT, USE_PERIOD_MAX_CNT, ONCE_USE_LIMIT_TYPE_CD, ONCE_USE_FIX_PT, ONCE_USE_PURCHASE_RATE, ONCE_USE_MIN_PT, ONCE_USE_MAX_PT, TOTAL_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT, MIN_PURCHASE_AMT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT) values (#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isuStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isuEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{contRegDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{useStartDtCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useStartDtCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{usePeriodCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{usePeriodCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{contStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mixUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isuPeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isuPeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isuPeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{onceIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{onceIsuFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{onceIsuPurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{onceIsuMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{onceIsuMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{usePeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{usePeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{usePeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{onceUseLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{onceUseFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{onceUsePurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{onceUseMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{onceUseMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{minPurchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_sub_cont_mst
CONT_NO,
CONT_SEQ,
CONT_NM,
START_DT,
END_DT,
ISU_START_DT,
ISU_END_DT,
USE_START_DT,
USE_END_DT,
CONT_REG_DT,
USE_START_DT_CALC_TYPE_CD,
USE_START_DT_CALC_VAL,
USE_PERIOD_CALC_TYPE_CD,
USE_PERIOD_CALC_VAL,
CONT_STS_CD,
MIX_USE_YN,
ISU_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD,
ISU_PERIOD_MAX_PT,
ISU_PERIOD_MAX_CNT,
ONCE_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD,
ONCE_ISU_FIX_PT,
ONCE_ISU_PURCHASE_RATE,
ONCE_ISU_MIN_PT,
ONCE_ISU_MAX_PT,
USE_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD,
USE_PERIOD_MAX_PT,
USE_PERIOD_MAX_CNT,
ONCE_USE_LIMIT_TYPE_CD,
ONCE_USE_FIX_PT,
ONCE_USE_PURCHASE_RATE,
ONCE_USE_MIN_PT,
ONCE_USE_MAX_PT,
TOTAL_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD,
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT,
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT,
MIN_PURCHASE_AMT,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{startDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{endDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{isuStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{isuEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{contRegDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{useStartDtCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{useStartDtCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{usePeriodCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{usePeriodCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{contStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mixUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isuPeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isuPeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{isuPeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{onceIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{onceIsuFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{onceIsuPurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{onceIsuMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{onceIsuMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{usePeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{usePeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{usePeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{onceUseLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{onceUseFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{onceUsePurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{onceUseMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{onceUseMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{minPurchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_sub_cont_mst
CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_SEQ = #{row.contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_NM = #{row.contNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
START_DT = #{row.startDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
END_DT = #{row.endDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ISU_START_DT = #{row.isuStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ISU_END_DT = #{row.isuEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
USE_START_DT = #{row.useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
USE_END_DT = #{row.useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CONT_REG_DT = #{row.contRegDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
USE_START_DT_CALC_TYPE_CD = #{row.useStartDtCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_START_DT_CALC_VAL = #{row.useStartDtCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
USE_PERIOD_CALC_TYPE_CD = #{row.usePeriodCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_PERIOD_CALC_VAL = #{row.usePeriodCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CONT_STS_CD = #{row.contStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MIX_USE_YN = #{row.mixUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{row.isuPeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_PERIOD_MAX_PT = #{row.isuPeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_PERIOD_MAX_CNT = #{row.isuPeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ONCE_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{row.onceIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ONCE_ISU_FIX_PT = #{row.onceIsuFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ONCE_ISU_PURCHASE_RATE = #{row.onceIsuPurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
ONCE_ISU_MIN_PT = #{row.onceIsuMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ONCE_ISU_MAX_PT = #{row.onceIsuMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{row.usePeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_PERIOD_MAX_PT = #{row.usePeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_PERIOD_MAX_CNT = #{row.usePeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ONCE_USE_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{row.onceUseLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ONCE_USE_FIX_PT = #{row.onceUseFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ONCE_USE_PURCHASE_RATE = #{row.onceUsePurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
ONCE_USE_MIN_PT = #{row.onceUseMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ONCE_USE_MAX_PT = #{row.onceUseMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{row.totalIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT = #{row.totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT = #{row.totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MIN_PURCHASE_AMT = #{row.minPurchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_sub_cont_mst set CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_SEQ = #{row.contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_NM = #{row.contNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_DT = #{row.startDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, END_DT = #{row.endDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ISU_START_DT = #{row.isuStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ISU_END_DT = #{row.isuEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, USE_START_DT = #{row.useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, USE_END_DT = #{row.useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CONT_REG_DT = #{row.contRegDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, USE_START_DT_CALC_TYPE_CD = #{row.useStartDtCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_START_DT_CALC_VAL = #{row.useStartDtCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, USE_PERIOD_CALC_TYPE_CD = #{row.usePeriodCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_PERIOD_CALC_VAL = #{row.usePeriodCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CONT_STS_CD = #{row.contStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MIX_USE_YN = #{row.mixUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{row.isuPeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_PERIOD_MAX_PT = #{row.isuPeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_PERIOD_MAX_CNT = #{row.isuPeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ONCE_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{row.onceIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ONCE_ISU_FIX_PT = #{row.onceIsuFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ONCE_ISU_PURCHASE_RATE = #{row.onceIsuPurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, ONCE_ISU_MIN_PT = #{row.onceIsuMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ONCE_ISU_MAX_PT = #{row.onceIsuMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{row.usePeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_PERIOD_MAX_PT = #{row.usePeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_PERIOD_MAX_CNT = #{row.usePeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ONCE_USE_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{row.onceUseLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ONCE_USE_FIX_PT = #{row.onceUseFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ONCE_USE_PURCHASE_RATE = #{row.onceUsePurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, ONCE_USE_MIN_PT = #{row.onceUseMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ONCE_USE_MAX_PT = #{row.onceUseMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{row.totalIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT = #{row.totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT = #{row.totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MIN_PURCHASE_AMT = #{row.minPurchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_sub_cont_mst
CONT_NM = #{contNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
START_DT = #{startDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
END_DT = #{endDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ISU_START_DT = #{isuStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ISU_END_DT = #{isuEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
USE_START_DT = #{useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
USE_END_DT = #{useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CONT_REG_DT = #{contRegDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
USE_START_DT_CALC_TYPE_CD = #{useStartDtCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_START_DT_CALC_VAL = #{useStartDtCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
USE_PERIOD_CALC_TYPE_CD = #{usePeriodCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_PERIOD_CALC_VAL = #{usePeriodCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CONT_STS_CD = #{contStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MIX_USE_YN = #{mixUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{isuPeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ISU_PERIOD_MAX_PT = #{isuPeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_PERIOD_MAX_CNT = #{isuPeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ONCE_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{onceIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ONCE_ISU_FIX_PT = #{onceIsuFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ONCE_ISU_PURCHASE_RATE = #{onceIsuPurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
ONCE_ISU_MIN_PT = #{onceIsuMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ONCE_ISU_MAX_PT = #{onceIsuMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{usePeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USE_PERIOD_MAX_PT = #{usePeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_PERIOD_MAX_CNT = #{usePeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ONCE_USE_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{onceUseLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ONCE_USE_FIX_PT = #{onceUseFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ONCE_USE_PURCHASE_RATE = #{onceUsePurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
ONCE_USE_MIN_PT = #{onceUseMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ONCE_USE_MAX_PT = #{onceUseMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{totalIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT = #{totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT = #{totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MIN_PURCHASE_AMT = #{minPurchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} and CONT_SEQ = #{contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_sub_cont_mst set CONT_NM = #{contNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_DT = #{startDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, END_DT = #{endDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ISU_START_DT = #{isuStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ISU_END_DT = #{isuEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, USE_START_DT = #{useStartDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, USE_END_DT = #{useEndDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CONT_REG_DT = #{contRegDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, USE_START_DT_CALC_TYPE_CD = #{useStartDtCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_START_DT_CALC_VAL = #{useStartDtCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, USE_PERIOD_CALC_TYPE_CD = #{usePeriodCalcTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_PERIOD_CALC_VAL = #{usePeriodCalcVal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CONT_STS_CD = #{contStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MIX_USE_YN = #{mixUseYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{isuPeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISU_PERIOD_MAX_PT = #{isuPeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_PERIOD_MAX_CNT = #{isuPeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ONCE_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{onceIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ONCE_ISU_FIX_PT = #{onceIsuFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ONCE_ISU_PURCHASE_RATE = #{onceIsuPurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, ONCE_ISU_MIN_PT = #{onceIsuMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ONCE_ISU_MAX_PT = #{onceIsuMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_PERIOD_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{usePeriodLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_PERIOD_MAX_PT = #{usePeriodMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_PERIOD_MAX_CNT = #{usePeriodMaxCnt,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ONCE_USE_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{onceUseLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ONCE_USE_FIX_PT = #{onceUseFixPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ONCE_USE_PURCHASE_RATE = #{onceUsePurchaseRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, ONCE_USE_MIN_PT = #{onceUseMinPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ONCE_USE_MAX_PT = #{onceUseMaxPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_ISU_LIMIT_TYPE_CD = #{totalIsuLimitTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_PT = #{totalIsuAblePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_ISU_ABLE_CNT = #{totalIsuAbleCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MIN_PURCHASE_AMT = #{minPurchaseAmt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT} and CONT_SEQ = #{contSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}
